page_summary: List route in the shared BCWS Angular shell. The route appears to depend on the published-incident family and related attachment or external-link families, while also sharing the public perimeter layer used elsewhere in the cluster.
confirmed_summary: The route shares the same Angular shell and bundle as dashboard and map. The public perimeter layer is concrete and queryable, and the bundle exposes published-incident, attachment, external-link, and situation-report client families.
unresolved_summary: The `wfim` and `wfnews` hosts still do not resolve from this environment, so the incident-list payload, attachment payloads, and external URI payloads remain unresolved.

endpoints.notes: Shared Angular bundle used by dashboard, map, and list.
Shared bundle contains the incident client family and stage-of-control model fields, but hostname did not resolve from this environment.
Shared bundle contains attachment client wiring, but hostname did not resolve from this environment.
Shared bundle contains external URI client wiring, but hostname did not resolve from this environment.
Shared bundle client family is present, but hostname did not resolve from this environment.
Public ArcGIS feature layer is queryable. Fields include `FIRE_STATUS`, `FIRE_SIZE_HECTARES`, and `FIRE_URL`.

widgets.notes: Most natural first list candidate if the published-incident API becomes directly reachable.

widgets.label: Route-level incident detail input
widgets.notes: Perimeter features expose `FIRE_URL`, but the route-level incident detail and external URI payload path remains unresolved.
